title: Baked Zucchini with Mozzarella
ingredients: 2 medium zucchini sliced into ¼- ½ inch pieces
McCormick Himalayan Pink Salt with black Pepper and Garlic
instructions:
Place the sliced zucchini on a baking sheet and sprinkle with the seasoning.
Bake for 10-15 minutes or until crisp.
Remove from the oven and top each slice with the mozzarella cheese.
Turn the oven up to a broil and place the baking sheet in the oven. Broil until the cheese is bubbly and a little browned. This will happen rather quickly so watch carefully.
